name: ghost-skills
description: A curated collection of installable Claude skills. Senior-grade, reference-backed skills you can drop into any project.

plugins.name: senior-ux-audit
plugins.description: Senior-level UI/UX audit of a complete website or web app: heuristic evaluation (Nielsen's 10), WCAG 2.2 accessibility, Core Web Vitals, visual hierarchy, responsive behavior, navigation/IA, forms and conversion friction — delivered as a severity-rated, scored, RICE-prioritized report.

plugins.name: agentic-ai-backend-audit
plugins.description: Senior adversarial audit of an AI-agent-built and/or agentic/LLM backend, run after an agent finishes a feature. 18 lenses across security & access control, prompt & agent safety, data protection & leakage (PII/PHI, RAG/embedding/log/cross-tenant), reliability, observability/evals/governance, and AI-authorship hygiene. Names each issue, cites file:line, warns 'this may cause <impact>', rates severity 0-4, and ends with a Ship/Fix-then-ship/Block verdict.
